title: sabatia difformis
intro: Sabatia difformis, also known as Rose Sage or Northern Sage, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and antispasmodic, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sabatia difformis include relief from respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Sabatia difformis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
